channel.title: GitHub R Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of R in GitHub

item.title: MRCIEU/TwoSampleMR
item.description: R package for performing 2-sample MR using MR-Base database

item.title: sqjin/CellChat
item.description: R toolkit for inference, visualization and analysis of cell-cell communication from single-cell data

item.title: chris-mcginnis-ucsf/DoubletFinder
item.description: R package for detecting doublets in single-cell RNA sequencing data

item.title: rmaia/pavo
item.description: tools for the analysis of color data in R

item.title: YuLab-SMU/clusterProfiler
item.description: 📊 A universal enrichment tool for interpreting omics data

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R
item.description: A curated list of awesome R packages, frameworks and software.

item.title: immunogenomics/harmony
item.description: Fast, sensitive and accurate integration of single-cell data with Harmony

item.title: GreenleafLab/ArchR
item.description: ArchR : Analysis of Regulatory Chromatin in R (www.ArchRProject.com)
